suppress.notes: The quarkus-openapi-generator-server-2.14.0-lts.jar is a code-generation-only dependency: it produces the Java classes and REST APIs of the io.openk9.enrichers module from internally defined OpenAPI specifications. The resulting APIs are generated source code and have no relation to the /api/gen/clients/{language} endpoint referenced in CVE-2023-27162.

CVE-2019-11405 affects the build files (build.gradle, build.sbt) generated by openapi-generator for the generated project itself. In this project, quarkus-openapi-generator-server is used only to generate entities and REST APIs from OpenAPI specifications.

CVE-2021-21428 affects openapi-generator-online, the web application that exposes a REST API to generate code on demand via HTTP. This project does not use openapi-generator-online: quarkus-openapi-generator-server is invoked locally during the Maven build phase, not through any web server.

Affects the openapi-generator Maven plugin, which uses File.createTempFile() during the generate-sources phase. This project does not use it, quarkus-openapi-generator-server is declared as an optional build-time dependency and the code generation is performed internally by Quarkus via quarkus-maven-plugin. The vulnerable plugin is never invoked.

Netty (netty-transport) is included transitively via quarkus-smallrye-openapi dependency and is only used to expose the /q/swagger-ui and /q/openapi endpoints at runtime. This module is not intended to run as a standalone service and does not expose any custom HTTP endpoints.

Netty (netty-codec) is included transitively via quarkus-smallrye-openapi dependency and is only used to expose the /q/swagger-ui and /q/openapi endpoints at runtime. This module is not intended to run as a standalone service and does not expose any custom HTTP endpoints.

Netty (netty-buffer) is included transitively via quarkus-smallrye-openapi dependency and is only used to expose the /q/swagger-ui and /q/openapi endpoints at runtime. This module is not intended to run as a standalone service and does not expose any custom HTTP endpoints.

Netty (netty-common) is included transitively via quarkus-smallrye-openapi dependency and is only used to expose the /q/swagger-ui and /q/openapi endpoints at runtime. This module is not intended to run as a standalone service and does not expose any custom HTTP endpoints.

Netty (netty-handler) is included transitively via quarkus-smallrye-openapi dependency and is only used to expose the /q/swagger-ui and /q/openapi endpoints at runtime. This module is not intended to run as a standalone service and does not expose any custom HTTP endpoints.

Netty (netty-resolver) is included transitively via quarkus-smallrye-openapi dependency and is only used to expose the /q/swagger-ui and /q/openapi endpoints at runtime. This module is not intended to run as a standalone service and does not expose any custom HTTP endpoints.
